---
title: "Daniel L. P. Esteves dos Reis"
image: foto_minha.jpeg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/daniel-esteves-dos-reis-08849127
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/dlpereis
    - icon: file-earmark-person
      text: Curriculum Vitae
      href: https://dlpereis.github.io/margin_notes/CV_2025_Eng.pdf
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:estevesdosreis@hotmail.com
---

Quantitative Research Specialist at **BOCOM BBM**, based in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil. I work at the intersection of econometrics, financial modeling, and risk management — developing predictive models for credit risk, probability of default estimation, economic capital, and stress-testing frameworks.

Previously a Research Assistant at **IPEA** (Institute for Applied Economic Research), where I built forecasting models for Brazilian agricultural markets and contributed to inflation monitoring for government agencies.

My academic background includes an M.Sc. in Applied Economics from UFJF and doctoral studies in Applied Mathematics at ISEG Lisbon. I hold the **CFA Level 1** designation and was recognized with an **Honorable Mention** at the Paulo Haddad Award from ABER.

This blog — *Margin Notes* — is where I write about economics, statistics, and finance, with a focus on quantitative methods and data analysis. The posts combine rigorous methodology with accessible narrative, bridging the gap between academic research and practical application.
